overall.description: First-person driving footage from Cyberpunk 2077, traveling through a rainy night on elevated highways and underpasses. The vehicle navigates through industrial concrete infrastructure with neon lighting, wet reflective surfaces, and empty roads, transitioning from open highway to covered underpass and back to elevated expressways with city views.

events.description: approaching the entrance of a covered highway underpass

agents.ego_description: driving on rain-slicked highway at 60-70 km/h, decelerating as approaching underpass entrance

entered.detail: tall concrete sound barrier with chain link fencing on top
metal fencing atop the concrete barrier
tall industrial street light illuminating the wet road
dark tunnel entrance with concrete archway ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along an open elevated highway during a heavy downpour at night. Industrial street lights cast yellow reflections on the wet asphalt as the car approaches a dark underpass entrance flanked by concrete barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with concrete infrastructure

events.description: entering covered underpass, switching from street lights to fluorescent tube lighting
approaching underpass exit, natural darkness and rain visible ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through covered highway section at 50-80 km/h, surrounded by concrete pillars and overhead pipes

entered.detail: massive concrete columns supporting the highway structure
exposed pipes and conduits running along the underpass ceiling
linear fluorescent fixtures illuminating the tunnel
smooth concrete walls lining the underpass sides
bright exit opening visible at the far end of the underpass

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered underpass section, transitioning from the open rain to a sheltered concrete corridor with fluorescent lighting. The camera moves between massive support pillars beneath the highway infrastructure, accelerating toward the distant exit where the rainy night is visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with guardrails and city views

events.description: exiting underpass back into open rainy night with street lighting
passing concrete wall with yellow 'Broken' graffiti on right side
taking gradual right curve on the highway while maintaining high speed

agents.ego_description: accelerating from 80 to 120 km/h on open elevated highway, navigating gentle curves through heavy rain

entered.detail: steel highway guardrail along the right edge of the road
concrete divider separating highway lanes on the left
distant neon-lit city skyline visible through the rain and fog
concrete wall with prominent yellow 'Broken' graffiti text
construction barrels lined along the right shoulder

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the vehicle accelerates onto an open elevated highway with metal guardrails and concrete barriers. The camera passes the iconic 'Broken' graffiti wall while the distant city skyline glows through the rainy night, navigating gentle curves at high speed past construction barrels.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp with billboards and desert vegetation

events.description: approaching highway exit ramp with overhead signage and billboards
passing desert vegetation and cacti along the right roadside

agents.ego_description: navigating exit ramp area at 80-100 km/h, decelerating slightly while following road markings

entered.detail: overhead highway exit signs with directional arrows
large illuminated advertising billboards visible in the distance
tall cactus-like desert plants along the roadside
painted white directional arrows on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a highway exit ramp marked by overhead signage and illuminated billboards. The environment transitions to a more arid setting with desert vegetation appearing along the right side, while the car follows painted road markings through the continuing rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rainy industrial landscape that transitions from an open highway into a sheltered underpass before emerging toward a distant city skyline and arid outskirts. It begins on an elevated highway during a heavy downpour, where yellow street lights reflect off the wet asphalt as the vehicle approaches a dark concrete entrance. As the car enters the covered underpass, the open rain gives way to a sheltered corridor of fluorescent lighting and massive support pillars before accelerating toward the distant light of the exit. The scene then opens back into the rainy night, passing a graffiti-covered wall and navigating high-speed curves with the glowing city skyline visible in the distance. Finally, the vehicle follows painted markings toward a highway exit ramp, where the industrial concrete shifts to include desert vegetation and illuminated billboards under the continuing rain.
